title: gentianella muelleriana
intro: Gentianella muelleriana, also known as Alpine gentian or Alpine willow gentian, is a flowering plant species belonging to the gentian family (Gentianaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Gentianella muelleriana include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as salves and ointments, to promote wound healing and skin health.
